arguments.command:
ls -lt day09/*.json && echo '---' && for f in day09/*.json; do echo "## $f"; python - <<PY
import json,sys
p=sys.argv[1]
with open(p) as f: d=json.load(f)
print('keys:', list(d.keys())[:10])
print('report_generated_at' in d, d.get('report_generated_at'))
PY "$f"; done
